channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Antarctica is melting from below and scientists say it’s worse than expected
item.description: Scientists have uncovered a hidden Antarctic threat that could accelerate global sea level rise far faster than expected. Deep beneath floating ice sh...

item.title: Scientists successfully transfer longevity gene and extend lifespan
item.description: Scientists at the University of Rochester pulled off a remarkable experiment: they transferred a longevity-related gene from the famously long-lived n...

item.title: Brain scans reveal a shocking difference between psychopaths and other people
item.description: Scientists have uncovered a striking brain difference linked to psychopathy: people with psychopathic traits were found to have a striatum — a brain r...

item.title: Scientists discover the brain’s hidden “stop scratching” switch
item.description: Scientists have uncovered a hidden “stop-scratching” signal in the nervous system that tells your brain when enough scratching is enough. The discover...
